question: What is the maximum horizontal permanent link length for solid-conductor cabling?
gold_snippets: The horizontal permanent link is limited to 90 metres of solid-conductor cabling

question: What is the maximum total channel length including patch cords?
gold_snippets: the total channel length must not exceed 100 metres

question: What category supports 10GBASE-T to 100 metres subject to alien-crosstalk mitigation?
gold_snippets: Cat 6A supports 10GBASE-T to 100 metres, subject to the 90-metre permanent-link limit and alien-crosstalk mitigation

question: How many outlets does TIA-568-D require per work area?
gold_snippets: TIA-568-D requires a minimum of two outlets per work area

question: What is the maximum single-mode intra-building backbone distance?
gold_snippets: single-mode fibre, the intra-building backbone may reach 2,000 metres

question: What is the mandatory topology for commercial building cabling?
gold_snippets: The hierarchical star is the mandatory topology for commercial building cabling

question: How far does OM4 support 40 Gbps?
gold_snippets: OM4 extends 40 Gbps to 150 metres

question: What is the minimum bend radius for OM4 under no-load conditions?
gold_snippets: The minimum bend radius for OM4 is 30 mm under no-load conditions

question: What polish type is required for passive optical networks?
gold_snippets: APC is required for passive optical networks and any WDM application

question: What is the maximum conduit fill for multiple cables?
gold_snippets: Conduit fill for low-voltage communications cabling shall not exceed 40 percent

question: What is the maximum support spacing for ladder-type cable trays in standard installations?
gold_snippets: Support spacing shall not exceed 2.4 metres for standard installations

question: What is the minimum size for the telecommunications bonding backbone conductor?
gold_snippets: The telecommunications bonding backbone (TBB) shall be a 6 AWG copper conductor minimum

question: What is the maximum ground resistance from any TGB to the main electrical service ground?
gold_snippets: The resistance from any TGB to the main electrical service ground shall not exceed 1 ohm

question: What is the minimum sleeve extension above and below a concrete slab for metallic sleeves?
gold_snippets: Metallic sleeves cast or core-drilled into concrete floors must extend 25 mm above and below the slab surface

question: What is the labelling format required by TIA-606-B?
gold_snippets: The identifier format is: BLD-FLR-TR-PORT

question: What is the minimum service loop length required at telecommunications rooms?
gold_snippets: A service loop of 3 metres minimum shall be left at each telecommunications room end

question: What colour should patch cords be for critical or security circuits?
gold_snippets: red for critical or security circuits

question: What is the Cat 6A insertion loss limit for the channel at 250 MHz?
gold_snippets: the insertion loss limit is 20.9 dB for the channel

question: How long does a full Cat 6A autotest take per link?
gold_snippets: requires approximately 12 seconds per link

question: How many watts can IEEE 802.3bt Type 4 deliver?
gold_snippets: IEEE 802.3bt Type 4 delivers up to 90 watts of DC power

question: What is the maximum cable temperature rise allowed at the centre of a PoE bundle?
gold_snippets: Temperature rise at the bundle centre shall not exceed 10 degrees Celsius above ambient

question: What cable type is recommended for OSDP communication?
gold_snippets: OSDP operates over RS-485 with a recommended shielded 22 AWG pair

question: What is a typical electrified strike current draw at 12 VDC?
gold_snippets: A typical electrified strike draws 250 mA at 12 VDC

question: What is the end-of-line resistor value for door position monitoring loops?
gold_snippets: an end-of-line resistor, typically 1 kOhm

question: Approximately how much storage is needed for 90-day retention of 4K surveillance at 30 fps?
gold_snippets: storage sizing is approximately 4 TB per camera

question: What is the maximum throughput supported by IP-over-coax extenders on RG-59?
gold_snippets: support up to 100 Mbps over 300 metres of RG-59

question: What is the approximate indoor coverage area per Wi-Fi 6 access point in an open office?
gold_snippets: a Wi-Fi 6 access point provides coverage to approximately 500 square metres in open office environments

question: What is the theoretical aggregate throughput of Wi-Fi 7?
gold_snippets: Theoretical aggregate throughput reaches 46 Gbps

question: What is the maximum passive HDMI 2.1 cable length for Ultra High Speed certification?
gold_snippets: The maximum reliable passive HDMI 2.1 cable length is 3 metres

question: What is the maximum distance supported by HDBaseT?
gold_snippets: The maximum distance for HDBaseT is 100 metres

question: What is the temperature rating for plenum cable under continuous load?
gold_snippets: Temperature rating for plenum cable is 75 degrees Celsius under continuous load

question: What standard do CMR cables comply with?
gold_snippets: Riser-rated cables (CMR) comply with UL 1666

question: How many rack units does a standard 19-inch equipment rack typically provide?
gold_snippets: Standard 19-inch equipment racks provide 42 to 48 rack units

question: What is the minimum cover depth for direct-burial cable in pedestrian areas?
gold_snippets: minimum cover depth of 600 mm in pedestrian areas

question: What is the minimum room size for a telecommunications room serving a single floor?
gold_snippets: A telecommunications room serving a single floor shall be a minimum of 3 metres by 3.6 metres

question: What is the minimum ceiling height for a telecommunications room?
gold_snippets: Ceiling height shall be 2.7 metres minimum

question: What BICSI standard covers data centre design?
gold_snippets: BICSI-007 covers data centre design and operations

question: What is the current TIA revision that introduced Cat 8?
gold_snippets: TIA-568-D is the current revision, introducing Cat 8

question: What is the recommended minimum number of inner-ducts for a two-building campus link?
gold_snippets: A minimum of four 90 mm inner-ducts is recommended for a two-building link

question: What is the optimal mounting height range for data centre patch panels?
gold_snippets: The recommended mounting height for patch panels is between 14 RU and 32 RU

question: What is the rack spacing requirement for rear access?
gold_snippets: Racks shall be spaced at minimum 900 mm apart for rear access

question: What does TIA-568-C.3 cover?
gold_snippets: TIA-568-C.3 covers optical fibre cabling components
